name: Bengali-Style Oven-Fried Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Remove the oven racks and spray them with olive oil.
3. Wash the potatoes and slice them lengthwise into sticks that are about 1/2 inch thick, or crosswise into rounds that are about 1/3 inch thick.
4. Transfer the slices to a baking pan and spray well with olive oil.
5. Add the seasonings and toss to coat evenly.
6. Place the rounds in a single layer on the oven racks.
7. Place the racks in the center of the oven.
8. Bake until the potatoes are tender, with a deep, golden-brown crust, about 20 to 25 minutes.
9. Serve piping hot.
